hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then grep -n 'client.messages.create\|anthropic.Anthropic' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'prompts/' && echo 'WARNING: Possible inline prompt detected. All Claude prompts must live in backend/prompts/ — not inline in code.' || true; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(git push|deploy|railway up|vercel deploy)'; then pytest --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -5 || (echo 'BLOCKED: Tests must pass before deploying. Run pytest and fix failures first.' && exit 2); fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then black "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null && flake8 "$FILE" --max-line-length=100 --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo "Lint issues found in $FILE — review before committing."; fi
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'test_'; then pytest "$FILE" --tb=short -q 2>/dev/null || echo "Tests failed in $FILE — fix before moving on."; fi

echo '=== MonthProof Session Started ==='; echo 'GOLDEN RULE: Numbers from pandas. Prose from Claude. Guardrail verifies both.'; echo 'NO inline prompts. NO Claude math. NO pgvector this week.'; echo 'Demo company: DRONE Inc. (not DRONE Inc. — legal reasons)'; echo '================================'
